subject: Two goblin-like figures — a small one swinging a hammer at a large one's toe — surrounded by flying nails and industrial hardware
description: A small goblinoid figure leaps up swinging a hammer toward the foot or toe of a much larger companion goblinoid. The larger creature recoils with a comically pained open-mouthed expression, arms flailing. Nails and large bolts scatter through the air around them. A massive mechanical contraption or gear structure looms at the right edge of the frame. The backdrop is a warm amber-orange industrial sky. The flavour text names the pair as Ig and Burf; Burf is the larger figure being accidentally struck. The scene has kinetic energy and slapstick timing.
foreground: Small goblinoid swinging hammer at larger goblinoid's toe, nails flying
emotion: slapstick pain, accidental chaos, friendly incompetence
